top_signals.title: Trump says he’ll speak to Taiwan leader, calling democratic island a ‘problem’
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said he would speak to Taiwanese leader Lai Ching-te — a move that would break with years of diplomatic precedent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
